# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-dev
  - deploy-prod

build_job:
  stage: build
  image: ubuntu:20.04
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts/bin
    - echo "dummy binary" > artifacts/bin/app
    - echo "dummy config" > artifacts/config/app.conf
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main

deploy_dev_job:
  stage: deploy-dev
  image: ubuntu:20.04
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to development..."
    - ls -la artifacts/
    - ./artifacts/bin/app
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  only:
    - main

deploy_prod_job:
  stage: deploy-prod
  image: ubuntu:20.04
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - ls -la artifacts/
    - ./artifacts/bin/app
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  only:
    - main
